selection.decision_rule: each contract independently retains an incumbent unless a challenger wins by > max(1 ns/read, 5%) with >=8/9 decisive paired wins
selection.ordering: the runtime winner among every eligible x86 barrier and the FreeBSD-owned vDSO/syscall ordering boundary precedes the wall read

elapsed.batch_order: public-first on even batches; exact-first on odd batches
elapsed.measurement_clock: std::time::Instant outside the measured read loop

now.batch_order: public-first on even batches; exact-first on odd batches
now.measurement_clock: std::time::Instant outside the measured read loop

elapsed.batch_order: public-first on even batches; exact-first on odd batches
elapsed.measurement_clock: std::time::Instant outside the measured read loop

now.batch_order: public-first on even batches; exact-first on odd batches
now.measurement_clock: std::time::Instant outside the measured read loop

selection.decision_rule: median advantage > max(1 ns/read, 5%) and >=8/9 decisive paired wins

wall_selection.decision_rule: each contract independently retains an incumbent unless a challenger wins by > max(1 ns/read, 5%) with >=8/9 decisive paired wins
wall_selection.ordering: the runtime winner among every eligible x86 barrier and the FreeBSD-owned vDSO/syscall ordering boundary precedes the wall read

elapsed.batch_order: public-first on even batches; exact-first on odd batches
elapsed.measurement_clock: std::time::Instant outside the measured read loop

now.batch_order: public-first on even batches; exact-first on odd batches
now.measurement_clock: std::time::Instant outside the measured read loop

elapsed.measurement_clock: std::time::Instant outside the measured read loop

now.batch_order: public-first on even batches; exact-first on odd batches
now.measurement_clock: std::time::Instant outside the measured read loop

perf.decision_rule: no perf provider exists on this target; the measured native CLOCK_THREAD_CPUTIME_ID entry winner is the complete public path
perf.measurement_clock: raw SYS_clock_gettime(CLOCK_MONOTONIC_RAW), never libc/vDSO or the candidate under test

selection.read_cost_basis: CLOCK_THREAD_CPUTIME_ID remains a kernel-entry SystemCall tier through either the libc wrapper or raw ABI; relative wrapper speed does not change mechanism class
